# Hawaii Painters 808

> Hawaii Painters 808 is a licensed and insured painting contractor based in Honolulu, Hawaii. Locally owned and operated, serving all of Oʻahu since 2012. We specialize in residential and commercial interior and exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, and drywall repair. Every project is personally overseen to ensure quality results and customer satisfaction.

## Business Information

- **Business Name:** Hawaii Painters 808
- **Website:** https://housepaintershonolulu.com
- **Phone:** (808) 272-3816
- **Address:** 3215 Ala Ilima Street, Honolulu, HI 96818
- **Hours:** Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sunday: By appointment
- **License:** Licensed & Insured in Hawaii
- **Founded:** 2012
- **Google Rating:** 5.0 stars (16 reviews)

## Services

- **Interior Painting** — Walls, ceilings, trim, doors, and accent features for homes and businesses across Oahu.
- **Exterior Painting** — Weather-resistant exterior coatings designed to withstand Hawaii's tropical climate.
- **Residential Painting** — Full-service painting for single-family homes, condos, and townhouses.
- **Commercial Painting** — Office buildings, retail spaces, warehouses, and multi-unit properties.
- **Cabinet Painting & Refinishing** — Kitchen and bathroom cabinet repaints and refinishing without full replacement.
- **Drywall Repair** — Patching, texturing, and finishing drywall before painting.

## Service Areas (Oahu, Hawaii)

Hawaii Painters 808 serves all communities across Oʻahu, including:

- Honolulu
- Pearl City
- Kaneohe
- Kailua
- Waipahu
- Mililani
- Kapolei
- Ewa Beach
- Hawaii Kai
- Kahala / Diamond Head
- North Shore
- Waianae
- Makaha

## Why Choose Hawaii Painters 808

- Locally owned and operated — not a franchise
- Over 30 years of combined painting experience
- Licensed and fully insured
- Free estimates with no obligation
- Transparent pricing and reliable scheduling
- Expertise in Hawaii's unique climate and surface conditions
- 5-star rated on Google

To request a free estimate or book a consultation, visit:
https://housepaintershonolulu.com/contact

Or call directly: (808) 272-3816
